## X-Sense Home Security v1.3.12.12

### Blueprint
- Adds source metadata to the included X-Sense camera event blueprint so Home Assistant can track the blueprint source after import.
- Updates the blueprint import buttons in all language README files to use the GitHub blueprint file URL expected by Home Assistant's blueprint importer.

### Validation
- Adds regression coverage for the blueprint source metadata and import URL format.
- Keeps camera live stream code unchanged from the previous prerelease.
